description: IF IS NUMERIC class condition: WS-FIELD='12345' should test as numeric.
notes: Engine generates: ws_field.replace('.','').replace('-','').isdigit(). For PIC X field, input '12345' (padded to '12345     ') — the spaces make isdigit() return false after replace. IBM COBOL IS NUMERIC on PIC X checks if all chars are digits. Gap: engine may return 'N' if field is space-padded. If test fails, document as IBM vs Aletheia gap.
